meta.description: Signal fusion engine. Combines ALL findings from every module into one final signal with confirmations, scoring, and output formatting.

fusionProcess.description: Every module reports findings; the engine fuses them into ONE decision. Nothing is signalled from a single module alone.

inputs.provides: structure events, OBs, FVGs, liquidity, premium/discount
current confluence weights and symbol-specific stats

steps: 1. Collect all findings into a findings[] array with direction votes (bullish/bearish/neutral).
2. Discard findings that conflict with hard rules (e.g. sell Boom in overdue spike window).
3. Compute direction: weighted vote using confluence weights x timeframe multipliers x learned weights.
4. If direction vote is not decisive (>= 65% one side), output NO_TRADE.
5. Count valid confluences for the winning direction; check minimums (3 trend / 5 counter-trend).
6. Run the confirmation checklist (below). All required confirmations must pass.
9. Emit signal in signalOutputSchema format with full reasoning.

confirmationChecklist.description: Proper confirmations to run BEFORE any signal is final. Required ones must all pass.

required.check: Trigger candle has CLOSED (never signal on a forming candle).
Signal direction matches bias, OR counter-trend requirements fully met.
Entry is AT a defined zone/POI, not in open space.
RSI on entry TF is on the correct side of 50 or hooking in signal direction.
No hard rule violated (spike window, session limits, max trades).
Structure-based SL/TP gives at least the strategy's minimum R:R.

optionalBoosters.check: Tick volume expansion in signal direction

combinationRules: ALL findings must be combined — a signal must cite every module that contributed.
Two weak signals in the same direction do NOT equal one strong signal unless they are independent confluence types.
One HTF finding outweighs two LTF findings of the same type.
If spikeDetection reports high probability, it overrides drift-direction findings on Boom/Crash.
The learned weight (self-learning.json) scales each confluence: weight_final = base_weight x tf_multiplier x learned_multiplier.

rules: Signal is invalidated if price violates the SL level before entry triggers.
Signal expires after N candles on the entry timeframe (default 10) if entry never fills.
A new HTF CHoCH against the signal cancels it immediately.
On Boom/Crash, a spike printing before entry resets the analysis.
